releases.name: Public beta - v2.3.000-rc1
releases.body:
Changelog from v2.2.110

- Many code refactors including a massive overhaul of graphic pipeline
- Graphic pipeline code revision - removed some old and obsolete hacks
- Updated some external components - SDL, Cubeb, mGBA, etc.
- Updated NDK to v25.2.9519653 and some Android libraries
- Minor updates to JIT
- Minor updates to Vulkan backend
- Minor optimization to Vertex Loader
- Updated GameINI database
- Updated out of sync code across the project

This codebase is roughly equivalent to the Official Dolphin dev build 5.0-19479 (Jun 2, 2023).

**General information**
- Hi everyone, It’s been a while since I last worked on the MMJR2 emulator. Unfortunately, work and real-life commitments took a toll on the time I could invest in maintaining MMJR2. I also encountered a significant performance regression that impeded my progress. There are many possible causes for this issue: around June 2023, the Dolphin team added a new asset loader system for graphic mods and custom textures, changed how Dolphin handles threading, and made some updates to the graphics pipeline.
- Since I don’t have as much time anymore, I decided to roll back from Dolphin 5.0-19582 to 5.0-19479 and release a beta version. I made good progress over the months, and it would be a shame not to share it. I did some preliminary testing of this build, and it seems the regressions are not present. However, I didn’t have time to test it thoroughly, hence the beta release.
- I am also waiting for an RP4 Pro and am giving my RP3+ to a friend. While this doesn’t necessarily mean the end of this project, I currently lack a sufficiently low-power device to test new builds on.
- I’ve learned a lot about Git, GitHub, Android development, and Dolphin while working on this project. If you want to help or continue working on MMJR2, let me know. I’d be happy to assist.

**Caution**
- Save States from v2.2.110 are **NOT** compatible with this release. Make sure you have an in-game save before updating.

**Hints**
- For optimal performance on RP3/RP3+ use Performance profile.
- To eliminate shader compilation stuttering enable "Compile Shaders Before Starting". The compiled shaders are usually version/backend specific. Once done you won´t have to compile them again unless you switch to other backend, update the emulator or mess with some settings.

**Known Issues**
- Fast Forward Hotkey is broken. Somehow nobody noticed for a very long time. This is fixed in v2.3.000-rc2.

releases.name: v2.2.110
releases.body:
Changelog for v2.2.110
- Fixed "Compile Shaders Before Starting" hang
- Small fix to FileUtil behavior

I had a report about a performance drop from v2.2.000. After extensive testing, I couldn´t reproduce it on my devices, nor was I able to track it to a specific code change. Every build has a slight minimal variance in performance. This can account for shader compilation, shader cache buildup, SoC thermal throttling, OS state, background apps, etc. When you first run any game on a new version of MMJR2, the shader cache is updated. There might be some minor dips as the shaders are rebuilt and cached that go away after a while, or after you close and reload the game. There might be some performance hits on different SoCs, most likely due to architecture differences and GPU drivers, but I cannot test, nor fix that. If you are affected by a performance hit, you can go back to v2.2.000. Thanks to everyone, who helped me with testing. 

This release codebase is roughly equivalent to the Official Dolphin dev build 5.0-18515.

**Savestates from v2.2.000 and v2.2.100 are compatible.**  You should be able to update without any problems or revert back to older version if you have issues.

releases.name: v.2.2.100
releases.body:
This is a minor update with some handy fixes.

Changelog for v2.2.100
- Improvements to logic op approximation
- Removed obsolete "Skip Approximate Logic Op" hack
- Removed unused force filtering setting
- Fixed Touch IR Pointer mode selection
- Fixed missed custom directory entries - now you can clean game cache files from UI again
- MMJR2 updater is now hidden from the UI - as we all know, it wasn´t working anyway
- Minor code updates and cleanup

This release codebase is roughly equivalent to the Official Dolphin dev build 5.0-18515

**Savestates from v2.2.000 are compatible.** You should be able to update without any problems or revert back to v2.2.000 if you have issues.

releases.name: v.2.2.000
releases.body:
I think it's finally time to stop tinkering and finally release a new version. So here it goes 😄 

**Changelog from v2.1.010 to v2.2.000**

- updated NDK to 25.1.8937393
- updated Android libraries
- Java 11 bytecode is now enabled across project
- code cleanup and refactoring
- minor fixes to JitArm64
- unitialized XFB color changed from pink/magenta/fuchsia to black, making rendering artifacts with "Store XFB copies to Texture only" less noticeable
- exposed "Store XFB Copies to Texture only" speedhack in Quick settings menu
- exposed "Show FPS" in the Quick settings menu
- fixed misaligned OSD messages
- hopefully fixed a throttle bug that made game run at super fast speed after loading state
- removed Autoupdater from the UI, it wasn´t working anyway
- added an option to force linear texture filtering and exposed it in the Android settings
- added sharp bilinear postprocessing shader
- added integer scaling shader
- implemented PPC Data Cache (currently not exposed in Android UI - kills performance)
- implemented CPU Vertex Culling (Graphics Settings->Advanced) - auto-enabled in Metroid Prime and Twilight Princess
- Skylanders Portal support is now in the core (but not exposed in Android due to missing Android UI)
- less confusing version information in the main menu
- other minor fixes and changes

**Known issues**
- When updating from older build, Dolphin may hang on building shader cache.
- If that happens delete shader cache (/mmjr2-vbi/Cache/Shaders/ and .uidcache files in /mmjr2-vbi/Cache/), disable "Compile Shaders Before Starting", run the game, exit emulator and then enable it again.

**Caution**

- **Save States from previous versions of MMJR2-VBI are NOT compatible! Make an in-game save, or you will lose progress!**
- This release will replace any MMJR2 build you might have installed! If the installation fails, uninstall your MMJR2 first. 
- Updating to this release will keep your original MMJR2 data intact. This release uses a separate /mmjr2-vbi folder in the root of your Internal storage.
- This release is incompatible with savestates from other forks (MMJR, MMJR2, Dolphin for Handheld) or Official Dolphin. 
- In-game saves are compatible. You can copy data to respective folders from your Dolphin user directory to the /mmjr2-vbi folder
- I am not an officially registered Android developer. Google Play Protect might get suspicious and give you a warning :)

**Additional information**

- For Daijishō users - this build uses **"106 - gc - Dolphin mmjr"** and **"334 - wii - Dolphin mmjr"** player settings
- All code ported over from Dolphin Official has links to original pull requests and respective authors. I deeply respect their work.
- This is a personal project. Additional updates and releases are possible but not guaranteed. If you enjoy it, great! Otherwise get Official Dolphin from PlayStore.

This release codebase is roughly equivalent to the Official Dolphin dev build 5.0-18439, Jan 30 2023. Don´t expect any massive performance gains, but there are some nice quality-of-life changes. 

Any Android developer willing to help me is welcome. Hell any developer willing to help is welcome 🙈  
The MMJR2 code and especially it´s Android part could use some love. Dolphin went through several massive code overhauls in 2023 and I am not sure how much they break MMJR2. I will try to keep up as long as my limited abilites let me. 

Feedback is welcome in the Discussions. You can also find me on Retroid Discord server. Happy gaming! ✌️

releases.name: v2.1.010
releases.body:
For people coming here from Discord there is an updated version available.

This is a minor update to the initial release. The version identifier of this build is 2.1-18025-r2

- Renamed VI Skip to VBI Skip to match Dolphin Official
- Update UI strings to reflect the custom user directory of this fork
- Fixed Game Covers not stored in the offline cache
- Some fixes to JitArm64 that may fix an uncommon crash I encountered during testing

**Known Issues**
The in-app updater is broken. Please download and sideload the APK manually.

The points mentioned in "Caution" and "Additional Information" in the previous release still stand. Please read them carefully. Happy gaming ✌️

releases.name: v2.1.000
releases.body:
This build of MMJR2 is based on Dolphin 5.0-18025 (Dec 9, 2022) with the following additional features ported over from Official Dolphin. The version identifier of this build is 2.1-18025.

- Improved VPS/FPS counter
- FrameTime/VBlank analyzer + graph
- VBI Skip Hack
- Added VBI Skip hack to the Quick Settings menu

**Caution**
- This release will replace any MMJR2 build you might have installed! If the installation fails, uninstall your MMJR2 first. Make sure you have a backup of the old build in case you want to revert back.
- Updating to this release will keep your original MMJR2 data intact. This release uses a separate /mmjr2-vbi folder in the root of your Internal storage.
- This release is incompatible with savestates from other forks (MMJR, MMJR2, Dolphin for Handheld) or Official Dolphin. 
- In-game saves are compatible. You can copy data to respective folders from your Dolphin user directory to the /mmjr2-vbi folder
- I am not an officially registered Android developer. Google Play Protect might get suspicious and give you a warning :)

**Additional information**
- Performance-wise, it should be comparable to Official Dolphin. Don´t expect any miraculous performance gains.
- For Daijishō users - this build uses **"106 - gc - Dolphin mmjr"** and **"334 - wii - Dolphin mmjr"** player settings
- All code ported over from Dolphin Official has links to original pull requests and respective authors. 
- This is a personal project. Additional updates and releases are possible but not guaranteed. If you enjoy it, great! Otherwise, Official Dolphin is probably a better choice.
- Enjoy :)

**Known issues**
- Game covers are not stored in the local cache. Running the emulator without an internet connection will result in empty covers. This will be fixed in the next release.
- Uncommon crash in LOTR: The Third Age after longer gameplay. According to the log, it´s related to JitArm64. It may affect other games as well. A promising fix is in the testing, it will be part of the next release.

releases.name: v0.9.0
releases.body:
## What's Changed

Fixes since prerelease:
* Fix touchpad right-click by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1071
* fix: remove 30s brightness blackout from ambient download overlay by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1086
* add OpenAL Soft Audio support, added presets for WINEDLLOVERRIDES for Quick Audio fixing by @Catpotatos in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1102
* BCN emulation was hidden from Proton x86_x64 by @Catpotatos in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1109
* Fix old installs for storage mgr by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1111
* Handle store-specific best configs by @utkarshdalal in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1115
* Reduce GC pressure in CaseInsensitiveFileSystem by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1120
* Fix crash on game start on Meta Quest by @lvonasek in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1105
* Don't show logged out steam splash when offline by @utkarshdalal in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1138
* Hide local saves only setting by @utkarshdalal in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1139


Fixes from 0.9.0-prerelease:
- Updated Wrapper - initial PowerVR (Pixel 10) GPU support - thanks to @sharpy66 and @Pipetto-crypto
- Added "use known config" and automatic best configs for Epic, GOG and Amazon by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/892
- Added Steam workshop implementation by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/977
- Added support for Steam game versions/branches by @morganwalkup in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/870
- Added "compatibility" filter by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/813
- Added downloads & storage manager by @xXJSONDeruloXx and @eredisg in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/878
- Added carousel layout by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/797
- Fixes for launching from frontends by @jeremybernstein
- Fix Steam cloud saves for games like Cult of the Lamb and Blue Revolver - apply UFS rootoverrides for Windows save paths by @kiequoo in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/839
- Screensaver for download screen OLED protection by @ObfuscatedVoid in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1017
- fix for games with Steam Input by @kiequoo in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1026
- Samsung DeX support by @AndreVto in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/793
- Upload achievements in real-time & custom achievement pop-up placements by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/975
- Fix display of game playtime by @kiequoo in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/957
- Preserve settings on Steam logout by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/903
- Winlator ludashi effects by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/803
- Improve boot splash tip readability on dark displays by @nacl-dev in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/823
- Launch games in the correct workingDir, fix some cloud saves and no launches by @kiequoo in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/775
- Reduces boot time on external storage by @giovannygb in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/747
- Fix CursorWindow crash on large Steam libraries by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/961
- add battery temperature metric to performance HUD by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/991
- Nicer amazon images by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1021
- Nicer images for in GOG detail screens by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/998
- Reduce buggy game calculation size (eg in RE4) by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/929
- Adjust color scheme of the External Display Input (on Thor-type devices) by @MayRedBeWithYou in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/838

And many more:

- Add connector context to XConnectorEpoll logs by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/869
- Fixed a bug with steam 2017 vc redists by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/886
- feat: performance hud customizability, adtl params by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/877
- Fix SD card game detection after crash by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/889
- Added "not logged in" splash screens by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/844
- Update manifest.json by @utkarshdalal in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/879
- Bugfix: Launch deps should be run in offline mode by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/898
- fix: allow downloads over VPN connections by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/882
- Fix Steam WebSocket idle disconnects by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/771
- Fix cold-launch intent race, add failure feedback by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/884
- Fix dpad ordinality on dpad that allows opposing directions to be pressed simultaneously by @iobg in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/805
- fix(): update achievement background for better contrast by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/836
- Moved image fetching to custom games by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/810
- fix(): silent hill 4 reg fixes by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/926
- Fix carousel external mouse scrolling and dragging by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/931
- Support old manifest download size format (Assassin's Creed 1 fix) by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/924
- Add Steam cloud saves browser shortcut by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/840
- Feat/perf hud text outline by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/915
- Added launch argument gamefixes by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/930
- Fix intent launch edge cases: two-tier snackbar, offline fallback by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/912
- Fix "Resume" button staying after completed download/update by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/923
- fix: show Steam sign-in in menu after logout by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/790
- refactor: poison Toast and migrate to SnackbarManager by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/851
- Skip symlinks in exe search by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/900
- fix: stabilize carousel cpu perf on idle by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/968
- Fix expired license filtering without JSON string parsing by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/985
- fix: prevent quick menu controller tab focus bounce by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/976
- fix: preserve Steam session state on unexpected auth loss by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/973
- fix: defer intent launches until GOG/Epic/Amazon service is ready by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/987
- feat: allow disabling of cloud saves per game by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/596
- fix: correct FEX_SMC_CHECKS env var to FEX_SMCCHECKS by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/990
- Make images fill their container for library layout: hero by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1003
- feat: add new keyboard QuickMenu navigation keys by @AndreVto in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/946
- Added Ubisoft Connect preinstall step by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/921
- feat: add Xbox controller style toggle to swap A↔B and X↔Y button icons by @kiequoo in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/958
- fix: verify controller characteristics as detection by @AndreVto in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/972
- Fix ControlsProfile binding deserialization by @Nightwalker743 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/979
- Use canonical root for dosdevices (imagefs parent safeguard) by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1029
- Refactored default Proton downloads to launch deps by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1031
- fix: custom game exit quits app instead of returning to library by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1040
- fix: track axis press state to avoid spurious releases by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1001
- Fix case-sensitive filesystem creating duplicate directories by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/941
- fix: preserve xconnector waits across suspend interrupts by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1033
- fix: Steam cloud save sync fixes by @kiequoo in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1044
- fix: prevent quick menu tab debounce when controller active by @xXJSONDeruloXx in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/996
- Overlay: show active state on toggle icons, use per-item accent colors by @unbelievableflavour in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/873
- Feat & Fix: Environment variables presets + VKD3D_SHADER_MODEL=6_0 set as default + bug fix by @Catpotatos in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1104
- fix: add app paths to goldberg config to fix games dlc detection by @joshuatam in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1098

## New Contributors
* @iobg made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/805
* @sharpy66 made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/904
* @nacl-dev made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/823
* @morganwalkup made their first contribution in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/870

* Added automatic updates in-app, no more needing to go to GitHub
* Use avg frame rate and session length for compatibility list
* Fixed games that have both 32-bit and 64-bit depots by @jeremybernstein in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/206
* Add com.oculus.vrshellsupports_free_resizing to allow window resizing on Oculus Quest headsets by @goopsie in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/221
* Added option to go into offline mode manually in app
* Allow downloads over ethernet
* Small fix for launching via Steam client
* Initial support for multiple languages by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/249
* dxvk-2.7.1 added by @phobos665 in https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/261

releases.body:

Fix of crash for top padding must be non-negative

releases.name: v1.3.0
releases.body:
Additions: 
- [Preference] Day, Night, Auto theme.
- [Preference] Theme color palette.
- [Preference] Which screen to launch on. (Library, Downloads, or Friends).
- Chatting with friends, with message history, emoticon and sticker support. 
- Friend profiles, with basic friend management.
- Option to view external web links in app or externally with a browser of choice.
- Game app screen shows basic information.
- More library filer options, which are retained. 

Fixes: 
- Profile dialog works better for long names now.
- Crash when null messages are logged. 
- Crashes when a failed sign in occurred, such as invalid credentials. 
- Correct display of install/run button and download progress for apps. Thanks @Producdevity
- Add smooth transitions for download state. Thanks @Producdevity
- Friends list groups able to be collapsible now.
- Library scroll position should remember when navigating away.
- Library list optimization.
- Soft resize issue with on-screen keyboard is opened/closed.
- Rotating the screen closes some dialogs.
- Dialog list scrolling on small screen height. Thanks @Producdevity
- Themed app icon being oversized.
- Game app screen image loading shifting.

Changes: 
- Connection to steam now uses the Web Socket protocol.
- Login errors are shown in a snackbar.
- Various theme unification for light and dark mode.
- Various Compose tweaks.
- Access tokens now encrypted.
- Removed automatic app backup.
- Actively filter out Spacewar (game).
- Library filter options now is a bottom sheet modal.

Misc: 
- Add Github Actions for snapshot and validation builds.
- Update readme.
- Dependency updates. Now using JavaSteam 1.6.0.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oxters168/Pluvia/compare/v1.2.0...v1.3.0

releases.body:
## Changelog (Based on Official v11 Final)

---

### **Drive Path Update**
* **Path Migration:** Changed `drive E` to `drive K` for `installed_components`.
* **Manual Installation:** Supported manual copying of components directly to `drive K\installed_components\`.

### **System & Environment**
* **Automated Symlink:** Mapped `C:\users` to `Z:\home\Ajay_drive\users` to prevent save data loss when switching containers.
* **Environment Variables:** Added some env variables.
* **Box64rc Optimization:** Updated config for trainer compatibility and added "trainer" keyword logic for auto-application.

### **Quick Access (Start Menu)**
* **Components Downloader:** Added GUI app for one-click downloads of **Box64**, **Turnip**, **DXVK** etc. (Improved error handling in hotfix)
* **Latest box64rc Downloader:** Added option to download the latest **Ajay.box64rc** instantly.
---
#### Note : Don't Change drive K path.
---

## 📁 Necessary Components and Tools

### ✅ [D3D Local tzst Files Collection](https://github.com/ajay9634/PcEmuFiles-Hub/releases/tag/D3D_tzst)  
### ⚙️ [Ajay Prefix Pro](https://github.com/ajay9634/Ajay-prefix) 

---

releases.name: Winlator 11 beta v3.1 mod Ajay
releases.body:
### Changelog

* **Drive path Update:** Changed drive E path to drive K for installed_components , You can copy box64,  turnip etc to drive K.
* **Automated Setup:** Implemented automatic configuration for SymLink folders and required dependencies.
* **Environment Variables:** Added new environment variables for improved configuration.
* **Start Menu:** Added an automatic update check feature to the Start Menu.
* **Box64rc:** Updated `box64rc` specifically for trainer compatibility.

---

### Final Update
* **SymLink Fix:** Resolved an issue causing the SymLink process to repeat unnecessarily.
* **Autorun.exe:** The application now runs without a console window.
* **Bug Fixes:** General stability improvements and minor bug resolutions.

### How to run ajau3 Script for downloading latest dxvk and turnip etc ?
Just install Ajay Prefix Pro then double click on it.
Requirements : Drive K should be mounted of this path -  `/data/data/com.winlator/files`

### How to run the trainer with game performance presets?
Simply include the word **"trainer"** in the filename of your game trainer or Cheat Engine application.

### Winlator.Ajay.Components.Downloader.ajau3 -
this program can be run after installing Ajay Prefix Pro. It can download latest installable components (box64 , turnip , wined3d , dxvk , vkd3d etc).

---
*Note: This release focuses exclusively on streamlining and automating the setup process. Do not close the container if any of the following processes are active in Task Manager: autorun.exe, cmd.exe, wget.exe, xcopy.exe, or 7z.exe.*

releases.name: Exiled-Kingdoms-Multiplayer-2.0
releases.body:
# 🛡️ [MOD] Exiled Kingdoms LAN Multiplayer — 2.0!

Hey everyone! Another update to the **LAN Multiplayer** mod for Exiled Kingdoms.

Here's the full summary:

---

## ⚔️ NEW — LAN Multiplayer Bug Fixes

### 🐛 Bug: Crash when entering Cities
- **Problem:** When entering some cities, the game would crash and close.
- **Fix:** Problem fixed, and you can now teleport and enter cities perfectly.

### 🐛 Bug: Monsters ignored the CLIENT when the HOST was far away
- **Problem:** Monsters only attacked when the HOST was nearby. If only the CLIENT approached, the monster would remain still.
- **Fix:** Detection now compares the HOST and all CLIENTs present on the same map and returns the **closest** to the monster as the target.

### 🐛 Bug: Incorrect monster level scaling in co-op
- **Problem:** Monsters scaled based on 0+ (extra players). × 2), resulting in level 2 Goblins in a session with 2
- **Correction:** Now uses the Bestiary's `minlevel` as a base before applying the LAN difficulty multiplier. Example: Goblin (base level 4) + 2 players = level 6. Yeti (base level 18) + 2 players = level 22.

### 🐛 Bug: CLIENT couldn't reduce HOST's HP in the PVP Arena
- **Problem:** In the PVP arena, the CLIENT attacked the HOST but the HOST's HP didn't decrease. The reverse worked correctly.

- **Correction:** CLIENTs can now post damage to peers in any context where the attack is valid. Outside the arena, the game's faction system already prevents attacks between allies naturally.

### 🐛 Bug: PVP Arena weapons remained in inventory upon exiting
- **Problem:** After PVP combat, the weapons provided by Arena Master items would remain in the player's inventory even after speaking with them to leave.

- **Correction:** When speaking with the Arena Master to leave (victory, defeat, or opponent disconnection), the game now explicitly removes all arena items before restoring the player's original inventory and using the **teleport** item to leave the Arena (Requires INT 2) to use the item.

---

## 🔧 Previous Improvements (summary)

| Improvement | Description |
|---|---|
| ✅ Rebalanced Gems | Cleaned containers + gems as monster drops |
| ✅ Gold -75% | 291 loot entries reduced for a more balanced economy |
| ✅ Weapon and Item Upgrades | Upgrade system implemented and corrected |
| ✅ Monsters +3 levels | 1364 scaled monsters, guaranteed minimum level = 4 |
| ✅ Translation | 95% complete All languages ​​translated |
| ✅ Loot | Loot fixed for chests, removing gems that were constantly appearing |

---

## 👹 **Added gem drop from specific monsters** with low chances:
| Monster | Gem | Chance (%) |
|---------|-----|-----------|
| Bosses (Minotaur, Dragon, etc.) | Ruby, Emerald, Sapphire | 15-25% |
| Elite mobs (Orc Leader, Dark Elf, etc.) | Small Ruby/Emerald/Sapphire | 5-10% |
| Strong Undead (Skeleton Champion, Lich) | Small Diamond | 3-8% |
| Dragons | Pearl, Purple Diamond | 2-5% |
| Common mobs (Orc, Bandit) | Small Ruby, Small Emerald | 1-3% |

---

## 📋 How Co-op Works Now

- **Same Map:** Monsters attack the nearest player (HOST or CLIENT) ✅
- **Different Maps:** Each player has their own monsters roaming independently ✅
- **PVP Arena:** Real PVP works — both players attack each other and lose HP ✅
- **Authoritative HOST:** Monsters and NPCs are controlled exclusively by the HOST, with no state conflict ✅

---

⚠️ **Tested in local LAN sessions with 2 players.**

⚠️ **Multiplayer performance depends on your connection; ensure a stable connection!!!**

⚠️ **Uninstall the previous version and install this one from scratch.**

---

**Thank you for the feedback; this improvement was thanks to your testing 🤜🤛**

releases.name: Exiled-Kingdoms-Multiplayer-1.0
releases.body: # ⚔️ Exiled Kingdoms — Multiplayer Hoje estou lançando uma versão muito especial do meu projeto para **Exiled Kingdoms**: um mod focado em **multiplayer Wi-Fi/VPN aprimorado**, **Arena PVP**, **alguns conteúdos inéditos**, **nova interface medieval** e várias correções importantes. Essa release foi construída para entregar uma experiência mais divertida, mais estável e muito mais completa para quem sempre quis ver Exiled Kingdoms com um lado mais social e competitivo. --- ## 🔥 Destaques desta versão ### 🎮 Multiplayer Wi-Fi/VPN muito mais sólido O sistema multiplayer foi retrabalhado para oferecer uma experiência melhor em coop, com: - sincronização de sprites em tempo real - movimentação remota mais suave - Companion AI funcionando para clientes Wi-Fi/VPN - chat funcional com suporte multilíngue - sons espaciais de combate por proximidade - limpeza correta de peers desconectados - proteção contra corrupção de save **MODO LAN NO CANTO SUPERIOR DIREITO** **UM DISPOSITIVO É O HOST E OUTRO É O CLIENT QUE VAI ADICIONAR O IP DO HOST OU BUSCA LAN E SE CONECTA** **CHAT LAN PARA OS JOGADORES PODEREM CONVERSAR E SABER ONDE ESTÁ CADA JOGADOR** --- ### 🎮 Aumentar e Diminuir a dificuldade quando quiser --- ### ⚔️ Nova Arena PVP 1v1 Agora o mod conta com uma **Arena PVP completa** para duelos entre jogadores em sessões "LAN". 📍 **Local:** Vale de Lannegar 👤 **NPC:** Mestre da Arena --- ### 🧙 Conteúdo exclusivo Esta release também adiciona conteúdo inédito ao jogo. #### 🏟️ Mestre da Arena Novo NPC responsável por iniciar e gerenciar o sistema PVP. --- ### 🎨 Nova interface medieval O lobby Wi-Fi/VPN e o chat foram redesenhados com uma identidade visual medieval dark fantasy, incluindo: - fundos escuros com tons de cobre/bronze - botões com bordas douradas - painéis estilizados - visual temático mais imersivo Tudo foi implementado programaticamente para manter compatibilidade e desempenho. --- ### 📦 Sistema de loot melhorado Diversos containers do mundo agora possuem tabelas de loot mais temáticas e mais equilibradas. O balanceamento foi pensado para enriquecer a exploração sem quebrar a progressão natural do jogo. --- ## 🌍 Idiomas Suporte para: - English - Español - Português (Brasil) - Русский - Deutsch - Polski - Čeština Os conteúdos exclusivos principais possuem suporte completo em **EN**, **ES** e **PT-BR**. --- ## ⚠️ Observações ### Requisitos do PVP - ambos os jogadores devem estar na mesma rede Wi‑Fi/VPN - é recomendado já ter visitado **Kingsbridge** - o PVP funciona em formato **1v1** ou **até 6 jogadores** ### Compatibilidade - Android 5.0+ - base Exiled Kingdoms --- ## 💬 Feedback Se encontrar bugs ou quiser mandar sugestões, abra uma issue ou envie seu feedback com o máximo de detalhes possível. --- ## 🛡️ Agradecimentos Obrigado a todo mundo que acompanha o projeto e apoia essa ideia de levar Exiled Kingdoms para um nível totalmente novo. Espero que gostem :)
